Morning Briefing MOCKUP Owner Mobile App

Saturday, 22 Mar 2026 · 6:30 AM
The owner's morning briefing is designed for quick consumption on mobile. It surfaces the most important business metrics, actionable tasks with specific people to contact, and a follow-up tracker — all in under 2 minutes of reading time.

Morning Briefing — Design Specification
① Morning Snapshot
  • Personalized greeting with date
  • 4 key metrics: Revenue, Trips, Cash, Overdue
  • Today's scheduled meetings
② Today's Priorities
  • AI-prioritized action items
  • Each item: Metric + Person + Action
  • Color-coded: Critical / Important / Routine
  • One-tap call/schedule from each card
③ Follow-Up Tracker
  • People-centric view (not task-centric)
  • Grouped by department/category
  • Quick-tap Call / WhatsApp buttons
  • Status badges: Overdue / Today / This Week
